models.events: Each event represents a scheduled item on the shared calendar, such as a photo shoot, product launch, or editorial plan.
models.users: Team members who can create events and be assigned as PIC (Person In Charge).
models.brands: The brands managed by the marketing team, used for filtering events.

relationships: Each Event belongs to a User (the creator/PIC)
Each Event is associated with a Brand
Events can be filtered by type, brand, or PIC

events.title: Ramadan Collection Photo Shoot
events.description: Studio photo shoot for Ramadan 2024 collection. 15 looks, 2 models. Location: Studio Kirana, Kemang.

events.title: ZS Active Campaign Launch
events.description: Social media campaign launch for new activewear line. Coordinate with influencer team for simultaneous posting.

events.title: Editorial Planning - March Issue
events.description: Monthly editorial planning meeting. Discuss content calendar, themes, and key messaging for March publications.

events.title: Lebaran Campaign Video Shoot
events.description: Video production for Lebaran greeting campaign. 3 short videos (15s, 30s, 60s versions). Talent: 2 models + voice over.

events.title: ZS Signature Pop-up Event
events.description: Exclusive pop-up store event at Plaza Indonesia. VIP preview for loyal customers.

events.title: Product Flat Lay Shoot
events.description: Flat lay photography for e-commerce. 30 products, white background.

events.title: Influencer Collaboration Meeting
events.description: Meeting with influencer management team to discuss Q2 collaboration opportunities.

events.title: April Editorial Content Review
events.description: Review and finalize content drafts for April editorial calendar.

events.title: New Collection Teaser Video
events.description: Short teaser video (15s) for upcoming summer collection. Behind-the-scenes style.

events.title: ZS Active Launch Party
events.description: Launch party for ZS Active new collection. 50 guests, influencers, media. Catering and goodie bags arranged.
